---
title: "Wrap Up"
---

## What we covered

- Shiny's input → output → reactivity model
- Building and running your first app
- `@reactive.calc` for shared computations
- Dashboard layouts: sidebars, columns, cards, value boxes
- Shiny modules: reuse UI + server logic without repeating yourself
- Testing with Playwright
- Deploying to Posit Connect Cloud

## Handling messy input & secrets

We didn't have time to cover these, but you'll want them soon:

- `req()`: stop execution until an input is valid/present, instead of erroring
    - <https://shiny.posit.co/py/api/core/req.html>
- `ui.notification_show()`: tell users what's wrong instead of failing silently
    - <https://shiny.posit.co/py/components/display-messages/notifications/>
- `python-dotenv`: keep API keys and other secrets out of your code with a `.env` file
    - <https://pypi.org/project/python-dotenv/>

## Other cool components to explore

- File upload / download
    - <https://shiny.posit.co/py/components/inputs/file/>
    - <https://shiny.posit.co/py/api/core/render.download.html>
- Multi-page apps with navbars (`ui.page_navbar()`, `ui.nav_panel()`)
    - <https://shiny.posit.co/py/layouts/navbars/>
- Progress bars for long-running tasks
    - <https://shiny.posit.co/py/components/display-messages/progress-bar/>
- Full component gallery
    - <https://shiny.posit.co/py/components/>

## This workshop

Everything from today:

<https://github.com/chendaniely/scipy-2026-shiny>

Bonus material (AI + LLM dashboards with `chatlas`, `shinychat`, `querychat`)
is in the "🎁 Bonus" section of the sidebar. Try it on your own time.

## Feedback survey

- Please take 2 minutes to fill out the SciPy session feedback
- It directly influences future tutorial selections
